expression: /* CB | Hard CAM Kill */ quality(streams, 'CAM', 'SCR', 'TS', 'TC', 'HC HD-Rip')
/* CB | Kill Season Packs When Episodes Exist */ count(negate(streams, seasonPack(streams))) >= 3 ? seasonPack(streams) : []
/* CB | Kill Ambiguous Packs When Non-Pack Exist */ count(negate(streams, seasonPack(streams))) > 0 ? negate(seasonPack(streams), episodePack(streams)) : []
